verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How lovely on the mountains are the feet of Him, Who brings good news, good news, Announcing peace, proclaiming news of happiness our God reigns, our God reigns!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Our God Reigns Our God Reigns Our God Reigns Our God Reigns

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Out of the tomb He came with grace and majesty, He is alive, He is alive. God loves us so, see here His hands, His feet, His side, Yes, we know, He is alive!
